strengths: Strong reader-first approach prioritizing narrative flow and engagement.
Excellent use of subheads to break up text and guide the reader.
Clear and concise lead that answers the core question quickly.
Human voice is evident, with specific examples and a clear point of view.
Accurate sourcing and adherence to provided facts.
Good information gain through analysis rather than just summary.
Well-structured article with a logical progression of ideas.
FAQ section provides genuinely useful, supplementary information.
Career arc section is a valuable visual aid.
weaknesses: SEO score is slightly lower due to the emphasis on reader experience over keyword stuffing, which is a deliberate choice but noted.
FAQ quality could be slightly improved by ensuring all answers are as concise as the questions.
While generally fluent, a few transitions could be smoother.
